title: Chiseler
description: Adds a machine to chisel blocks for you
body:
# ![Chiseler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PAmXvRwX/images/93840b2035640f776e7cc88b7329cbdd9ac78819.png)

## Addon for [Chisel](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn)
- Requires Chisel to be installed
- Lets you use energy to automate chiseling blocks!
- Energy mod required to power
- Custom GUI, given block to chisel and a template block for chiseling to, you can produce chiseled blocks at the price of power (12E / block, configurable)

## Power the Chiseler
![Chiseler Machine next to Generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PAmXvRwX/images/27e5f5375cc8d7869bb6feacdd2a3c93b7060012.png)

## Chisel blocks in a custom machine GUI
![Chiseler GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PAmXvRwX/images/cec27481c768fe6d3bba16f98bf64299fe79485b.png)

## Recipe
![Chiseler Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PAmXvRwX/images/18572c456bde256678d8f87aeb877236b0659e7f.png)

## Use hoppers or item pipes to transfer in and out of machine
and bob's your uncle!  
(That's all)
